title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and runs up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. The model features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open model from Google that generates text through a diffusion-based approach rather than standard autoregressive decoding. The shift matters because it changes how text is produced and reportedly delivers up to four times faster inference on dedicated GPUs. Key details include a 256-token canvas and built-in self-correction during generation.
